response.global_analysis:

2. JSON Usage: Fully manual visual event subtitling was applied, as the reference JSON did not contain any visual text transcription.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed to match the duration of the highly prominent transition slides displaying event notices and concert merchandise. No vocal dialogue is present.
